army_special_rules.name: The Arsenal of Democracy
army_special_rules.text: United States units firing any weapon that has multiple Shots may re-roll one failed 'to hit' roll per weapon type.

army_special_rules.name: Death From Above
army_special_rules.text: Infantry units do not suffer the usual –1 Morale penalty for entering play from Reserve using the Flight special rule. United States Vehicle units likewise ignore that penalty when using the Jump special rule.

army_special_rules.name: Tough As Nails
army_special_rules.text: All United States Platoon and Company Commanders start the game with an additional point of Guts. Units from the Heroes section of the Army List do not benefit.

army_special_rules.name: Tesla's Gift
army_special_rules.text: When a Rift Die is drawn, rolled, and assigned to a unit armed with any weapon with the Tesla Arc special rule (including because it was assigned an Order Die and had no Rift Die), you may re-roll the result.

special_platoons.name: Firefly Platoon
notes: Once per Game Turn, you may re-roll the result of a Regroup in Hell! for one of the units in this Platoon.

At the start of the game, before Deployment, nominate a unit from this Platoon. When it deploys from Reserve using Flight or Jump, enemy units that have yet to receive an Order and are within 12" may not react by opening fire. If that unit has the Regroup in Hell! Rift Enhancement, it may use it to move again after deploying from Reserve using the Flight rule.

units.name: Slammer Samuels
units.unit_type: Hero (May be used as a Company Commander) 158

rift.enhancement: Tesla Gauntlet. In Close Quarters combat, before any dice are rolled, Samuels can use his Tesla Gauntlet to gain a +D6 Pen modifier to any damage rolls he makes. He also gains the Tank Hunters special rule. If the result of the first round of Close Quarters is a draw, Samuels retains these benefits for the second round of fighting. If Samuels uses the Tesla Gauntlet enhancement exhaust one of his Rift Dice after that Close Quarters sequence is resolved (i.e., before another Order Die is drawn after two rounds of Close Quarters, if Samuels finds himself locked in combat).

units.name: Roberta Wells - Firefly Hero
units.unit_type: Hero (May be used as a Platoon Commander, Firefly Platoon only) 135
units.composition: 1 Heroic Officer in Grade 1 Powered Armour with Gravitic Jump Pack REQUISITION POINTS

rules.name: Resourceful
rules.text: Roberta Wells always takes any  Order Test she is required to make at her unmodified Morale Value.

rift.enhancement: Rift Science. At any time whilst executing an Order Roberta Wells may change the facing of an Active Rift Die of a friendly unit within 12" and within her Line of Sight to Surging, or an Exhausted Rift Die of a friendly unit within 12" and within her Line of Sight to Active. If the Rift Science Enhancement is used, exhaust one her Rift Dice after she has completed her Order. Rift Research. At any time whilst executing an Order, Roberta Wells may change the facing of an enemy Rift unit’s Rift Die to any side. The chosen unit must be within 12" of Roberta Wells and within her Line of Sight. If she uses this enhancement, exhaust one of her Rift Dice after she has completed her Order. Regroup in Hell! When executing an Advance or Run Order Roberta Wells can opt to take an additional 2D6" move after resolving her shooting or Close Quarters combat. This additional move uses the Flight special rule with the exception that Roberta Wells must land in Open Ground. If this Enhancement is used, exhaust one of her Rift Dice after she has completed her additional move.

rules.name: Independent
rules.text: Roberta Wells may never be assigned an  Order by means of a Snap to Action!, nor does she benefit

rules.name: Resourceful
rules.text: Roberta Wells always takes any Order Test she is required to make at her unmodified Morale Value.

rift.enhancement: Rift Research. At any time whilst executing an Order, Roberta Wells may change the facing of an enemy Rift unit’s Rift Die to any side. The chosen unit must be within 12” of Roberta Wells and within her Line of Sight. If she uses this enhancement, exhaust one of her Rift Dice after she has completed her Order.
rift.exhausted: Lose Fieldcraft. Gain Lumbering special rule – Reduced to a movement rate of 4" on an Advance Order and 8" on a Run Order. HQ Teams

units.name: Company Commander - Officer In Heavy Armour
units.composition: 1 Officer in Grade 1 Heavy Powered Armour Regular: 80

options.desc: Additional Fireflies armed with Thompson M1X1/2s

rules.name: Only Human
rules.text: Unlike other Rift units, a Firefly Officer can benefit from the presence of a nearby Medic.

rift.enhancement: Regroup in Hell! When executing an Advance or Run Order a Firefly Officer and any accompanying Fireflies can opt to take an additional 2D6” move after resolving their shooting or Close Quarters combat. This additional move uses the Flight special rule with the exception that the Firefly unit must land in Open Ground. If this Enhancement is used, exhaust the unit’s Rift Die after it has completed its additional move.

rules.name: Modern Communications
rules.text: US Artillery Forward Observers may re-roll the D6 when they roll on the Artillery Barrage Chart.

rules.name: Modern Communications
rules.text: US Firefly Artillery Forward Observers may re-roll the D6 when they roll on the Artillery Barrage Chart.

rules.name: Only Human
rules.text: Unlike other Rift units, a Firefly Forward Observer can benefit from the presence of a nearby Medic.

rift.enhancement: Regroup in Hell! When executing an Advance or Run Order, or after calling in an Artillery Barrage by way of a Fire Order, a Firefly Forward Observer and any accompanying Fireflies can opt to take an additional 2D6" move after resolving their shooting or Close Quarters combat. This additional move uses the Flight special rule with the exception that the Firefly unit must land in Open Ground. If this Enhancement is used, exhaust the unit’s Rift Die after it has completed its additional move.

units.name: Paragon Squad
units.composition: 1 Paragon NCO and 2 Paragons REQUISITION POINTS

options.desc: Replace SMG with Heavy Tesla Rifle

rift.enhancement: Gung Ho! Once per Game Turn, when issued an Order a Paragon Squad can immediately generate a point of Guts. Any model in the unit may spend Guts points as if they were a Hero. Any unused Guts points persist from turn to turn. If the Paragon Squad uses its Gung Ho! ability exhaust one of the unit’s Rift Die after the squad has completed its Order.

units.name: Super Bazooka Team
units.composition: 2 Soldiers in Grade 1 Heavy Powered Armour Regular: 105

options.desc: Replace the Assistant's Pistol with a Rifle
Replace the Assistant's Pistol with an SMG
Replace the Assistant's Pistol with an Assault Rifle

rules.name: Only Human
rules.text: Unlike other Rift units, a Firefly Flamethrower Team can benefit from the presence of a nearby Medic.

rift.enhancement: Controlled Burn. When a hit is scored with the Flamethrower, the Firefly Flamethrower Team may use this Enhancement. If it does, it may re-roll the D6 to determine how many hits are scored against the target unit. If it does, the firing unit suffers D3 Pin Markers, instead of the usual one. Additionally, no test is required to determine if the Flamethrower runs out of fuel – it is considered to have automatically passed. If this Enhancement is used, exhaust the unit’s Rift Die immediately after the shot has been resolved. Regroup in Hell! When executing an Advance or Run Order a Firefly Flamethrower Team can opt to take an additional 2D6" move after resolving their shooting or Close Quarters combat. This additional move uses the Flight special rule with the exception that the Firefly Flamethrower Team must land in Open Ground. If this Enhancement is used, exhaust the unit’s Rift Die after it has completed its additional move.
